[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000100 1
1 110010100 4
2 101000011 4
3 000001011 3
4 000000000 a
5 111000010 4
6 110100011 5
7 001100000 2
